parameters.jsonBody: ={"touser":"{{ $('Webhook Report Ready').item.json.openid }}","template_id":"{{$env.WECHAT_TEMPLATE_MSG_ID}}","url":"https://edu.wingo.icu/xsc/report?id={{ $('Webhook Report Ready').item.json.reportId }}","data":{"first":{"value":"您孩子的学情报告已生成！","color":"#173177"},"keyword1":{"value":"{{ $('Webhook Report Ready').item.json.subject === 'math' ? '数学学情分析' : ($('Webhook Report Ready').item.json.subject === 'chinese' ? '语文学情分析' : '英语学情分析') }}","color":"#333333"},"keyword2":{"value":"{{ $('Webhook Report Ready').item.json.childName || '您的孩子' }}","color":"#333333"},"keyword3":{"value":"{{ $('Webhook Report Ready').item.json.score }}分","color":"#333333"},"keyword4":{"value":"{{ $('Webhook Report Ready').item.json.accuracy }}%","color":"#333333"},"keyword5":{"value":"{{ $('Webhook Report Ready').item.json.timestamp || $now.toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm') }}","color":"#333333"},"remark":{"value":"薄弱点：{{ $('Webhook Report Ready').item.json.weakPoint || '点击查看' }}\n点击查看完整报告 + 今晚行动清单 →","color":"#fa9d3b"}}}

={"touser":"{{ $('Webhook Report Ready').item.json.openid }}","template_id":"{{$env.WECHAT_TEMPLATE_MSG_ID}}","url":"https://edu.wingo.icu/xsc/report?id={{ $('Webhook Report Ready').item.json.reportId }}","data":{"first":{"value":"【{{ $('Webhook Report Ready').item.json.institutionName || '机构' }}】学情报告已生成","color":"#173177"},"keyword1":{"value":"{{ $('Webhook Report Ready').item.json.subject === 'math' ? '数学学情分析' : ($('Webhook Report Ready').item.json.subject === 'chinese' ? '语文学情分析' : '英语学情分析') }}","color":"#333333"},"keyword2":{"value":"{{ $('Webhook Report Ready').item.json.childName || '您的孩子' }}","color":"#333333"},"keyword3":{"value":"{{ $('Webhook Report Ready').item.json.score }}分","color":"#333333"},"keyword4":{"value":"{{ $('Webhook Report Ready').item.json.accuracy }}%","color":"#333333"},"keyword5":{"value":"{{ $('Webhook Report Ready').item.json.timestamp || $now.toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm') }}","color":"#333333"},"remark":{"value":"点击查看个人完整报告 →","color":"#fa9d3b"}}}

={"touser":"{{ $('Webhook Report Ready').item.json.adminOpenid }}","template_id":"{{$env.WECHAT_TEMPLATE_ID}}","url":"https://edu.wingo.icu/xsc/b-admin","data":{"first":{"value":"【班级汇总】新报告已生成","color":"#173177"},"keyword1":{"value":"{{ $('Webhook Report Ready').item.json.className || '班级' }} 学情简报","color":"#333333"},"keyword2":{"value":"共 {{ $('Webhook Report Ready').item.json.reportCount || 1 }} 份报告","color":"#333333"},"remark":{"value":"点击查看班级汇总 →","color":"#fa9d3b"}}}
